text: Here's what science actually says about short chain fatty acids. They're tiny molecules made in your gut that can do big things. These acids can boost your immune system and improve gut health. Studies suggest they even help reduce inflammation and lower risk of chronic diseases. But remember, research is ongoing. Not all benefits are confirmed yet! Curious about your gut health? Follow for more science insights!
